case_title: PATRICIO G. HERRERA VS. THE HENRY WINE GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-23-2010 CONTINUED TO MAY-28-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
